title: Don’t Open That. – Horror Mystery Mod
description: All minecraft loot chests have a 20% chance to have THE MIMIC.
body:
⚠️ DO NOT OPEN IT.

This is a short horror mod that makes a chest an object you were never meant to interact with.

Once you open it... things start to change.

👁 Features:
- Strange events
- Hidden surprises

🔊 Best played alone, at night, with sound on.

You’ve been warned.
